translations.Starter overview with sample KPIs and ac: Starter overview with sample KPIs and activity placeholders. Replace this view with your own data.
translations.Wire buttons here to create records, ope: Wire buttons here to create records, open lists, or deep links. Use the sidebar for Settings and Documentation.
translations.This app needs OpenRegister to store and: This app needs OpenRegister to store and manage data. Please install OpenRegister from the app store to get started.
translations.User settings will appear here in a futu: User settings will appear here in a future update.
translations.No virtual apps yet — seed `hello-world`: No virtual apps yet — seed `hello-world` should appear after install.
translations.Integrator-only editor: edit the raw JSO: Integrator-only editor: edit the raw JSON manifest below. The visual editor lives in a follow-on release (openbuilt-page-editor).
translations.Paste or edit the JSON manifest here. Se: Paste or edit the JSON manifest here. See @conduction/nextcloud-vue/src/schemas/app-manifest.schema.json for the canonical schema.
translations.openbuilt.editor.help: Integrator-only editor: edit the raw JSON manifest. Visual editor lives in chain spec openbuilt-page-editor.
translations.Each tab declares either a list of widge: Each tab declares either a list of widgets OR a component (mutually exclusive).
translations.Label: Label
Load an application to start editing.
Maximum nesting depth is two levels.
translations.No menu entries yet. Click \"Add menu en: No menu entries yet. Click "Add menu entry" to start.
translations.No pages yet. Click \"Add page\" to star: No pages yet. Click "Add page" to start.
translations.Raw JSON tab — integrator fallback. Edit: Raw JSON tab — integrator fallback. Edits round-trip into the Design tab on commit.
translations.Route and href are ignored when an actio: Route and href are ignored when an action is set.
translations.Select a page on the left, or add one to: Select a page on the left, or add one to start designing.
translations.Structured chat editor (conversationSour: Structured chat editor (conversationSource OR postUrl one-of plus optional schema) coming in v1.1. For now, edit the raw JSON below or use the Raw JSON tab.
translations.Structured custom-page editor (customCom: Structured custom-page editor (customComponents registry picker + free-form config) coming in v1.1. For now, edit the raw JSON below or use the Raw JSON tab.
translations.Structured files editor (folder picker +: Structured files editor (folder picker + allowed-types selector) coming in v1.1. For now, edit the raw JSON below or use the Raw JSON tab.
translations.Structured logs editor (register / schem: Structured logs editor (register / schema / source / columns) coming in v1.1. For now, edit the raw JSON below or use the Raw JSON tab.
translations.Structured settings editor (section list: Structured settings editor (section list with fields / component / widgets exactly-one-of) coming in v1.1. For now, edit the raw JSON below or use the Raw JSON tab.
translations.The parent page route has no :param segm: The parent page route has no :param segment — detail pages typically need one (e.g. /messages/:id).
translations.Title: Title
translations.openbuilt.page-designer.menu.error.nesti: openbuilt.page-designer.menu.error.nesting-depth — menu depth limited to two levels.
translations.openbuilt.page-designer.preview.unavaila: openbuilt.page-designer.preview.unavailable — chain spec #2 not yet installed. Save and open the built app to preview your changes.
